sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51194" key="i)sourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσ-ουργός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔργον</etym>) <sense id="n51194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">doing like things</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
